allow: PowerShell($tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $tcp.Connect\("192.168.100.72", 1883\); "PORT 1883 TERBUKA" } catch { "PORT 1883 TERTUTUP/DIBLOKIR: $_" } finally { $tcp.Close\(\) })
PowerShell(netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="Mosquitto MQTT 1883" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=1883 2>&1)

PowerShell($tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $tcp.ConnectAsync\("192.168.100.72", 1883\).Wait\(2000\) | Out-Null; if \($tcp.Connected\) { "BERHASIL - Port 1883 bisa diakses dari luar" } else { "MASIH TERTUTUP" } } catch { "MASIH TERTUTUP" } finally { $tcp.Close\(\) })
